title: ModificationAdd
description: An add-on or discount to add to a subscription.

inherited_from_id.description: Identifier of the base add-on or discount definition to inherit from.

amount.description: Override the base amount for this add-on or discount on this subscription.

number_of_billing_cycles.description: Override the number of billing cycles for this add-on or discount.

never_expires.description: If true, override to apply this modification indefinitely.

quantity.description: Number of times this add-on is applied per billing cycle.
